name: ESET Protect
description: Monitor ESET Protect Cloud managed devices and endpoint security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ESET Protect Cloud console
2. Go to More > Users > API Users
3. Create a new API user with Device Management read permissions
4. Note your region from the console URL (eu, de, us, jpn, or ca)
5. Enter the API username, password, and region prefix

credentialFields.label: API Username
credentialFields.helpText: The username of the API user created in ESET Protect Cloud

credentialFields.label: API Password
credentialFields.helpText: The password for the API user

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your ESET region prefix: eu, de, us, jpn, or ca

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all managed devices enrolled in ESET Protect Cloud

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies endpoint protection status across all managed devices

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that ESET Protect has incident detection and alerting configured
